name: clearCredits
description: Reset credits data

name: connect
description: Connect to a Streamer.bot WebSocket server

name: disconnect
description: Disconnect Streamer.bot WebSocket

name: doAction
signature: doAction( action: string | Partial<Pick<StreamerbotAction, 'id' | 'name'>>, args?: Record<string, any>, options?: Partial<{ customEventResponse: boolean; }> )
description: Get all actions from your connected Streamer.bot instance

name: executeCodeTrigger
signature: executeCodeTrigger( triggerName: string, args?: Record<string, any>, options?: Partial<{ customEventResponse: boolean; }> )
description: Execute a custom code trigger

name: getActions
description: Get all actions from your connected Streamer.bot instance

name: getActiveViewers
description: Returns all active viewers and their user information

name: getBroadcaster
description: Get the current broadcaster account information

name: getCodeTriggers
description: Get all custom code triggers

name: getCommands
description: Get commands for the connected Streamer.bot instance

name: getCredits
description: Get the current credits payload

name: getEmotes
description: Get emotes for the selected platform

name: getEvents
description: Get all possible events that may be subscribed to

name: getGlobal
description: Get a global variable by name

params.name: name
params.description: The name of the global variable to fetch

params.name: persisted
params.description: Whether the global variable is persisted

name: getGlobals
description: Get all global variables

name: getInfo
description: Get information about the connected Streamer.bot instance

name: getMonitoredYouTubeBroadcasts
description: Get all monitored YouTube broadcasts

name: getUserGlobal
signature: getUserGlobal( platform: P, userId: U, name: K | null = null, persisted = true )
description: Get user global variables

params.name: platform
params.description: The platform to fetch globals for (twitch, youtube, trovo)

params.name: userId
params.description: The user ID to fetch globals for

params.name: name
params.description: Optional name of the global variable to fetch

params.name: persisted
params.description: Whether the global variable is persisted

name: getUserGlobals
signature: getUserGlobals( platform: P, name: K | null = null, persisted = true )
description: Get user global variables

params.name: platform
params.description: The platform to fetch globals for (twitch, youtube, trovo)

params.name: name
params.description: Optional name of the global user variable to fetch

params.name: persisted
params.description: Whether the global variable is persisted

name: getUserPronouns
description: Retrieves the pronouns of a user from the specified platform.

params.name: platform
params.description: The platform from which to retrieve the user's pronouns.

params.name: userLogin
params.description: The login name of the user whose pronouns are to be retrieved.

name: on
signature: on( event: TEvent extends StreamerbotEventName ? TEvent : StreamerbotEventName | '*', listener: (data: StreamerbotEventPayload<TEvent extends StreamerbotEventName ? TEvent : StreamerbotEventName>) => void )
description: Helper method to handle custom event subscriptions

params.name: event
params.description: The event name to subscribe to. Can be a specific event, source, or wildcard '*'.

params.name: listener
params.description: The callback function that will be invoked when the event occurs.

name: request
signature: request( request: StreamerbotRequest, id: string = '', timeout: number = 10_000 )
description: Make a request to the Streamer.bot WebSocket,

name: send
description: Send a raw object to the Streamer.bot WebSocket

name: sendMessage
signature: sendMessage( platform: StreamerbotPlatform, message: string, { bot = false, internal = true, ...options }: { bot?: boolean; internal?: boolean; replyId?: string; broadcastId?: string; } = {} )
description: Send chat messages

params.name: platform
params.description: The platform to send the message to

name: subscribe
description: Subscribe to events from your connected Streamer.bot instance

name: testCredits
description: Test credits by populating with fake data

name: unsubscribe
description: Unsubscribe from events you are currently subscribed to
